intro: Mortal! You dare enter the Tower of Sylvara?!
Foolish little creature… You have a death wish, stepping into my domain.
Your pathetic blade could never harm this towering body!
Come closer, insect… Let me crush you beneath my feet!
outro: H-How dare you…! You actually managed to tear my clothes so easily?!
Unbelievable… I can’t believe I’m being pushed to the brink by a mere human like you.
Hmm…? You’re not going to kill me? You wish to… breed me instead?
My body... What did you do to me? Why can't I resist your desire? Ahh... Come closer
